subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who created the Point and ordained for it four pillars, and manifested from the first pillar the letter Alif [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی خلق النقطه و جعل لها اربعه ارکان و اظهر من الرکن الاول الفا و
subcodes.subjects: @four pillars, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
